name: Oracle Private Agent Factory
description: No-code agentic platform for building and deploying AI agents with Oracle AI Database 26ai. Enables agents to autonomously analyze data, make decisions with human-in-the-loop, and execute automated business workflows at scale using private enterprise data.
capabilities: Knowledge Agent for RAG from unstructured data
Data Analysis Agent for structured datasets
pricing: Part of Oracle AI Database 26ai subscription (varies by workload)
notes: Launched March 2026 at Oracle Database Day. Pre-built enterprise-ready agents included. Designed specifically for production workloads with emphasis on data privacy and security. Integrates with Oracle Cloud ecosystem.
